notifications.title: Ubutumwa

home.hero_subtitle: Garden TVET School igufasha kwiga ubumenyi nyabwo n'ubuhanga buva ku banyamwuga — ikora abanyamwuga b'inzobere.
home.programs_desc: Reba imyuga yose dutanga ifite intego yo kuguha ubumenyi bukenerwa mu kazi k'iki gihe.
home.why_1_desc: Abanyeshuri bacu biga bakoresheje ibikoresho bya none mu manyalibo n'imyitozo nyayo.
home.why_2_desc: Abarimu bacu ni inzobere zifite uburambe burerure mu nzego z'akazi.
home.why_3_desc: Wabona impamyabushobozi yemewe na Leta ifungura imiryango mu Rwanda no hanze yarwo.
home.gallery_subtitle: Reba uko ishuri ryacu n'ibikoresho byacu bisa
home.faq_subtitle: Ibisubizo ku bibazo imiryango ibaza kenshi
home.testimonials_subtitle: Twumve abanyeshuri batsindiye akazi babikesheje twe
home.cta_subtitle: Iyungane n'amagana y'abanyeshuri bubaka ejo hazaza ryabo uyu munsi.

faq.q1: Nigute nasaba kwiga muri Garden TVET School?
faq.a1: Urashobora gusaba kuri internet ukanze buto ya "Saba Kwiga" iri ku ihuriro. Uzuza ifishi y'ubusabe n'amakuru yawe, hitamo umwuga n'urwego, hanyuma wohereze. Itsinda ryacu rizagusubiza.
faq.q2: Ni iki gisabwa kugira ngo wemererwe?
faq.a2: Ibikenerwa cyane ni urangije amashuri abanza, ufite imyaka iri hagati ya 14 na 25, kandi wujuje ibisabwa by'umwuga uhitamo. Imyuga imwe n'imwe ifite ibindi yongera.
faq.a3: Amafaranga atandukanye ku mwuga no ku rwego. Twandikire ku biro byacu byo kwakira abanyeshuri kugira ngo ubone amakuru ahagije ku bwishyu n'uburyo bwo kwishyura.
faq.a4: Yego, dufite icumbi cy'abanyeshuri. Imyanya iboneka ni mike kandi itangwa hashingiwe ku bukene n'ibihari.
faq.a5: Dutanga imyuga itatu ikuru: Ikoranabuhanga rya Software, Ikoranabuhanga ry'Imodoka, n'Ubwubatsi. Buri mwuga ufite inzego nyinshi kuva ku ntangiriro kugeza ku rwego rwo hejuru.

1.name: Jean Claude
1.quote: Garden TVET yampaye ubumenyi bushingiye ku gikorwa bwamfashije kubona akazi nifuzaga. Amahugurwa y’ibikorwa yari meza cyane!

2.name: Marie Anne
2.quote: Abarimu bari bafite ubumenyi cyane kandi badufasha. Narangije noneho mpita ngira akazi.

3.name: Patrick
3.quote: Ubunararibonye bw’ibikorwa nabonye hano nta gace bahaye. None mfite ikigo cyanjye cy’ubwubatsi!

about.title: Abo Turi Bo - Garden TVET
about.subtitle: Twiyemeje gutanga uburezi bw'umwuga bwiza buha abanyeshuri ubumenyi nyabwo bukenewe mu kazi kabo k'ejo hazaza.
about.mission_desc: Gutanga uburezi bw'umwuga bworoshye kandi bwiza buha abanyeshuri ubumenyi nyabwo bakeneye kugira ngo bagere ku ntego mu mirimo bahisemo.
about.vision_desc: Kuba ishuri ry'imyuga rikomeye mu Rwanda, ryitanga abanyamwuga b'inzobere bagira uruhare mu iterambere ry'igihugu.
about.value1_desc: Twiyemeje kugera ku rwego rwo hejuru mu burezi no mu myitozo.
about.value2_desc: Dushyigikiye ukuri n'imyitwarire myiza muri byose dukora.
about.value3_desc: Twemera ibitekerezo bishya n'ikoranabuhanga rishya kugira ngo dukomeze gutera imbere.
about.leadership_desc: Menya itsinda ryitangiye guteza imbere ishuri ryacu
about.cta_subtitle: Tangira urugendo rw'akazi keza uyu munsi.

services.title: Serivisi Zacu
services.heroDesc: Hindura ejo hazaza ryawe ukoresheje amasomo yacu y'umwuga yemewe. Iga ubumenyi nyabwo ubigishijwe n'inzobere kandi utangire akazi kawe.
services.readyFutureDesc: Tera intambwe ya mbere uyu munsi usabe muri kimwe mu byiciro byacu.

features.certifiedProgramsDesc: Impamyabushobozi za TVET zemewe ku rwego mpuzamahanga
features.careerSupportDesc: Ubufasha mu gushaka akazi no kuyobora umwuga

parent_apply.term2: Amafaranga y’ishuri agomba kwishyurwa ku gihe buri gihembwe

Software Development.name: Iterambere ry’Amasoftware
Software Development.description: Yiga ubuhanga bwo gukora amasoftware ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga rigezweho n’impamyabumenyi zemewe mu nganda.

modules.description: Yiga ibanze ya programming n’ibitekerezo bya logic

Automobile Technology.description: Mube umutekinisiye w’ibinyabiziga w’ubuhanga ukoresheje amahugurwa y’ibikorwa ku binyabiziga bigezweho n’ibikoresho byo gusuzuma.

modules.name: Gusuzuma kw’Inkuru
modules.description: Gusuzuma kuri mudasobwa no gukemura ibibazo

Building and Construction.description: Yiga ubuhanga bw’ingenzi mu bwubatsi kuva ku gusoma amashushanyo kugeza ku buhanga bwo kubaka.

modules.name: Ubuhanga n’Beton
modules.description: Akazi k’amatafari na tekinoroji ya beton

news_detail.no_comments: Nta gitekerezo kiraboneka. Ba uwambere gutanga igitekerezo!

hero.title: Ishuri ry’Imodoka
hero.subtitle: Funda amategeko y’umuhanda mu Rwanda kandi ufite ibisobanuro byuzuye

about.title: Ibyerekeye Ishuri ry’Imodoka
about.mission_text: Gutanga uburezi ku mategeko y’umuhanda mu Rwanda kugira ngo abantu bagire ubumenyi bwo gutwara imodoka neza kandi mu mutekano.
about.services_text: Dufite amasomo menshi, abarimu inzobere n’ibindi. Abanyeshuri bahabwa amahugurwa yuzuye yo kwemererwa gutwara mu Rwanda.
about.results_text: Abanyeshuri bagira icyizere kandi birinda ibikorwa bibujijwe ku muhanda. Bahinduka abashoferi b’umutekano.

course_detail.no_lessons: Nta isomo rikiri muri iri shuri kugeza ubu.

courses_data.title: Amategeko y’Umuhanda
courses_data.description: Iga amategeko yose y’umuhanda mu Rwanda kugira ngo ushobore gutwara mu mutekano kandi wizeye.

courses_data.title: Imashini z’Imodoka
courses_data.description: Iga ibice byose by’imodoka: moteri, frein, urubaho rw’imikinire, amatara n’ibindi. Uzungukira ubumenyi ku bikoresho by’imodoka.

courses_data.title: Uko Watwara Imodoka
courses_data.description: Iga uko utwara imodoka: gutangira, guhindura vitesse, guhagarara, gupariki n’ibindi. Tangira urugendo wizeye.

courses_data.title: Imyitozo yo Gutwara
courses_data.description: Imyitozo yuzuye: gupariki, gusubira inyuma, gutangira ku musozi, rondpwe n’ibindi. Igira ubunararibonye nyabwo ku muhanda.

courses_data.title: Umutekano w’Umuhanda
courses_data.description: Iga uko witabara: ibimenyetso, urunigi rw’umutekano, umuvuduko n’ibihe by’ikirere. Komeza umutekano ku muhanda.

courses_data.title: Kwitegura Ikizamini cy’Uruhushya
courses_data.description: Itegure ikizamini cya teori cy’uruhushya kugira ngo wemererwe gutwara. Birimo insanganyamatsiko zose zemewe.

instructors_data.bio: Inzobere mu mategeko y’umuhanda ifite uburambe bw’imyaka 10.
Mwarimu w’inararibonye mu mashini z’imodoka no kuzifata neza.
Inzobere mu gutanga amasomo y’imyitozo yo gutwara.

quiz_data.question: Ikimenyetso “STOP” gisobanura iki?
quiz_data.explanation: Ikimenyetso “STOP” gisobanura ko ugomba guhagarara burundu.

quiz_data.question: Mu Rwanda, imodoka zigendera ku ruhe ruhande rw’umuhanda?
quiz_data.explanation: Mu Rwanda imodoka zigendera iburyo bw’umuhanda.

quiz_data.question: Ni nde ufite uburenganzira bw’ibanze ku muhanda?
quiz_data.explanation: Abanyamaguru bafite uburenganzira bw’ibanze ku muhanda.

quiz_data.question: Itara ritukura ry’umuhanda risobanura iki?
quiz_data.explanation: Itara ritukura risobanura ko ugomba guhagarara burundu.

quiz_data.question: Ni ikihe kimenyetso kerekana ko umuhanda ufunze?
quiz_data.explanation: Ikimenyetso cy’umuhanda ufunze cyerekana ko umuhanda ufunze.
